summary: Excellent matrix recording with a spot‑on mix that captures an all‑time great June ’76 show highlighted by the legendary Playing in the Band > The Wheel > Playing in the Band jam.
review: All five reviewers rave about this Seamons matrix, praising its crystal‑clear soundboard core blended perfectly with just enough audience ambience to place you in the hall. Musically the concert is described as “another level,” with a blistering first set and an out‑of‑this‑world second set anchored by the iconic Playin>Wheel>Playin sequence, plus standout renditions of Tennessee Jed and a St. Stephen > Not Fade Away > St. Stephen sandwich.

ai_rating.rationale: Uniform 5‑star reviews highlight both superb musical performance and flawless matrix recording, leaving little doubt of an outstanding show.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Spot‑on mix with clean soundboard (SBD) source and just enough audience (AUD) to add space; no distracting chatter, described as “74‑ish” ambience.

standout_songs: Playing in the Band > The Wheel > Playing in the Band
St. Stephen > Not Fade Away > St. Stephen
show_quality.setlist_flow: Both sets are called “incredible” and “mind‑blowing,” with seamless transitions – especially the double‑trifecta of Playin>Wheel>Playin and the St. Stephen/NFA sandwich.

band_member_comments.Phil: Reviewer notes Phil's tribute to "the vast audio radiance" as a highlight.
